data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not demonstrate that the scenario behavior related to tamper-proof approval tokens is either confirmed as supported or produces a clear, actionable failure report. The linked use case describes a multi-party sign-off workflow but lacks specific details on how tamper-proof approval tokens are validated or implemented. This indicates a gap in the evidence regarding the requirement for deterministic validation of the scenario.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming the validation of tamper-proof approval tokens.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the tamper-proof approval tokens functionality.
